text:
- ESRD only
E_PRIMARY_PAYER_CD A Medicare beneficiary with medical coverage by some other primary payer - either a federal program or other insurance source. A - Working aged bene/spouse with an employer group health plan (EGHP)
B - End stage renal disease (ESRD) beneficiary in the 30 month coordination period with an employer group health plan
C - Conditional payment by Medicare; future reimbursement expected
D - Automobile insurance and no fault
E - Workers' compensation
F - Public health
